prompt: draw a violin plot showing reaction-time distributions for five age brackets (10s, 20s, 30s, 40s, 50s). Overlay dotted median lines and fill violins with a midnight-to-dawn gradient to evoke speed
prompt_refined: Generate an information graphic in the style of a violin plot. The plot should illustrate reaction-time distributions for five distinct age brackets: 10s, 20s, 30s, 40s, and 50s, with each bracket represented by a separate violin arranged horizontally. Each individual violin shape should be vertically filled with a gradient, transitioning from a dark midnight blue at the bottom to a vibrant, lighter dawn blue or purple at the top, visually conveying speed and dynamism. A clear, dotted line must be overlaid horizontally within each violin to precisely mark its median value.
objects: Vertical gradient fill within each violin shape (dark midnight blue to lighter dawn blue or purple)
Horizontal dotted line within each violin shape
